userStories.title: Move agents.vue to standalone route and fix API endpoint
userStories.description: Delete apps/web/pages/[project]/agents.vue and create apps/web/pages/agents.vue in its place. Remove the route.params.project / slug dependency entirely. The useAsyncData key becomes 'agents' (no slug). The fetch call changes from $api.get('/projects/${slug}/agents') to $api.get('/agents'). The changeStatus function must call $api.patch('/agents/${agent.slug}', { status: newStatus }) using agent.slug, not a project slug variable. The definePageMeta stays as { layout: 'default' }. All other template/logic from the original file remains unchanged.
acceptanceCriteria: useAsyncData key is the string 'agents' with no slug interpolation
useAsyncData handler calls $api.get('/agents') with no path parameters
route.params.project is not referenced anywhere in pages/agents.vue
changeStatus calls $api.patch('/agents/' + agent.slug, { status: newStatus }) using agent.slug

routing.reasoning: pure file move and URL string change — no logic, no new behaviour

userStories.title: Update layout navigation and breadcrumb for standalone /agents route
userStories.description: Edit apps/web/layouts/default.vue. Remove the NuxtLink to '/${projectSlug}/agents' from inside the 'v-if="projectSlug"' template block. Add a new NuxtLink to '/agents' in the always-visible nav section (same block as the Dashboard link), using the Bot icon from lucide-vue-next and the t('nav.agents') label. Add a breadcrumb case in the breadcrumbItems computed: when route.path === '/agents', return [{ label: 'Koda', to: '/' }, { label: t('nav.agents') }]. The Bot icon import is already present in the file.
acceptanceCriteria: layouts/default.vue does not contain a NuxtLink with :to containing projectSlug and '/agents'
layouts/default.vue contains a NuxtLink with to="/agents" outside any v-if="projectSlug" block
The /agents NuxtLink uses the Bot icon from lucide-vue-next
breadcrumbItems computed returns [{ label: 'Koda', to: '/' }, { label: t('nav.agents') }] when route.path === '/agents'

routing.reasoning: layout nav link addition and breadcrumb case — additive, no logic change
